rows.locks: Contract extends loop-coverage attribution and maps real dogfood evidence to milestones, gates, success criteria, and trends.
Planted four-gates/provenance failure ranks m68-real-title-run above lower-impact demo friction while ignoring passing coverage signals.
Acceptance evaluator emits declared-gate-style verdicts for every mapped milestone from existing evidence.
Previously satisfied predicates regress automatically when evidence changes and missing evidence is insufficient, not pass.
Self-audit demo composes ranked bottlenecks and per-milestone acceptance verdicts over a planted defect.
Coverage remains test-only, no human on autonomous path, no high-risk auto-apply, no new verifier, and no new data plane.

boundary: Coverage v61 records self-audit attribution and acceptance-audit regressions using existing dogfood evidence, ledger.jsonl, journal.md, verdicts, openchrome, loop-coverage attribution, evolve, source-apply, trust-gradient, and Rust tests; it is test-only and introduces no new verification engine and no new data plane; high-risk/source-affecting fixes are never auto-applied; fun/taste and release go/no-go remain human Ring 2; #1 and #23 remain open.
